title: calicotome spinosa subsp. rigida
intro: Calicotome spinosa subsp. rigida is a type of thorny shrub or small tree, native to the Mediterranean region, and is a subspecies of the Calicotome spinosa plant. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which have been utilized in traditional medicine for centuries. The health benefits of Calicotome spinosa subsp. rigida include the treatment of various ailments such as digestive issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, as well as its use as a diuretic and to reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Calicotome spinosa subsp. rigida include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health issues due to its versatility and effectiveness.
